name: WW Cinnamon Rolls
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. Spray an 8x8x2 inch baking pan with cooking spray and set aside.
3. Separate the biscuits, placing them in two rows on a work surface.
4. Using your fingers, flatten each biscuit into a 3-inch circle.
5. Brush each flattened biscuit with an equal amount of melted margarine.
6. Sprinkle each biscuit with an equal amount of cinnamon and dark raisins (1/4 teaspoon).
7. Roll each biscuit jelly-roll fashion and arrange in two rows, seam side down, in the sprayed pan.
8. Bake until rolls are puffed and golden brown, about 8-12 minutes.
9. Transfer the pan to a wire rack and let rolls cool in the pan.
10. In a small bowl or cup, combine the remaining 2 1/2 tablespoons brown sugar and powdered sugar.
11. Add water one tablespoon at a time, stirring constantly until the mixture is smooth and syrupy.
12. Remove the rolls from the pan and brush each with an equal amount of the sugar mixture.
Makes 10 servings (1 roll each). Each serving provides: 1 Bread, 1/2 Fruit, 1/2 Fat, and 20 Optional Calories. Per serving: 143 calories, 5 grams fat. Source: WW Favorite Recipes (1986). Hard to eat just one!!
